title: Xtra Crisp Tunisian Chwinamul Tagine
description: A keto-friendly one-pot dish featuring chwinamul and confit tomato, cooked to perfection in a tagine pot. This recipe combines nutty and crisp flavors for a unique taste experience.

ingredients.name: chwinamul
ingredients.notes: Korean aster leaf, available at Asian markets

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In the tagine pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chwinamul, paprika, cumin, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the confit tomato and stir gently to combine.
Transfer the tagine pot to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and top with sliced almonds.
Return the pot to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, until the almonds are golden brown.
Remove the pot from the oven and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
